mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT A.MENU_ID , A.MENUNM , A.MENU_ENNM , A.MENU_TTL , A.UP_MENU_ID , A.MENU_LV , A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_PATH , B.VIEW_AUTH AS USEYN , A.MENU_TYCD , A.LEFT_SIDE_MENU_IMG FROM TB_LMS_MENU A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT B WHERE A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.MENU_TYCD = B.MENU_TYCD AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.MENU_TYCD = #{menuType} AND B.USER_AUTHRT_ID = #{authGrpCd} AND B.VIEW_AUTH = 'Y' AND A.USEYN = 'Y'
AND A.MENU_ID != 'STU0000000001'
AND A.MENU_ID != 'PRO0000000001'
UNION SELECT A.MENU_ID , A.MENUNM , A.MENU_ENNM , A.MENU_TTL , A.UP_MENU_ID , A.MENU_LV , A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_PATH , B.USEYN , A.MENU_TYCD , A.LEFT_SIDE_MENU_IMG FROM TB_LMS_MENU A INNER JOIN CTE B ON A.UP_MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT MENU_ID , MENUNM , MENU_ENNM , MENU_TTL , UP_MENU_ID , MENU_LV , MENU_SEQ , MENU_URL , MENU_PATH , USEYN , MENU_TYCD , LEFT_SIDE_MENU_IMG FROM CTE ORDER BY MENU_PATH
